title: Completed SNOMED Procedure -> one procedure_occurrence row
notes: A FHIR Procedure with status='completed' and a single SNOMED CT code maps to exactly one procedure_occurrence row. The code is SNOMED 430193006 ('Medication Reconciliation (procedure)'). In the Athena vocabulary this code IS the standard concept: vocab.concept row concept_id=4326177 has vocabulary_id='SNOMED', concept_code='430193006', concept_name='Medication reconciliation', standard_concept='S', domain_id='Procedure'. The stage-2 SQL resolves the source code by joining vocab.concept (src) -> concept_relationship 'Maps to' (invalid_reason IS NULL) -> vocab.concept (std, standard_concept='S', domain_id='Procedure'). For an already-standard SNOMED Procedure code the 'Maps to' relationship is the self-loop 4326177 -> 4326177, so std_concept_id == src_concept_id == 4326177. Therefore procedure_concept_id=4326177 (standard target) AND procedure_source_concept_id=4326177 (the native-vocabulary source concept, which here coincides with the standard one because SNOMED is the OMOP Procedure standard vocab). procedure_source_value=430193006 (the raw code string). Domain routing keeps this row in procedure_occurrence because std.domain_id='Procedure'; a non-Procedure domain_id would have diverted it elsewhere and produced ZERO procedure_occurrence rows. Code priority is SNOMED > CPT4 > HCPCS > ICD10PCS via UNION ALL + DISTINCT ON (prio); only the SNOMED coding is present so prio=1 wins. procedure_type_concept_id is the hardcoded constant 32827 = 'EHR encounter record' (vocab.concept concept_id=32827, Type Concept domain, standard_concept='S'). Dates: performed[x] is a Period here (no performedDateTime), so the start drives procedure_date/procedure_datetime and the end drives procedure_end_date/procedure_end_datetime. Both timestamps are normalized to UTC: the SQL casts to timestamptz then 'AT TIME ZONE UTC'. The source instants carry a +00:00 offset, so after UTC normalization the wall-clock components are unchanged: start 2017-11-01T12:07:09 -> procedure_datetime 2017-11-01T12:07:09 and procedure_date 2017-11-01; end 2017-11-01T12:22:09 -> procedure_end_datetime 2017-11-01T12:22:09 and procedure_end_date 2017-11-01. provider_id is NULL: Synthea Procedures carry no performer[] array, so performer.first().actor.getReferenceKey() yields null and referenceToId(null) is null. visit_occurrence_id = referenceToId(encounter.getReferenceKey()) resolved from the Encounter reference. person_id = referenceToId(subject.getReferenceKey()). The status filter WHERE COALESCE(status,'completed') NOT IN ('entered-in-error','not-done','unknown') passes for 'completed'. modifier_concept_id, quantity, visit_detail_id, modifier_source_value are not populated by the SQL and stay NULL (no bodySite read in this edge's stage-2). Derived from real Synthea resource fhir.procedure id 16033dc9-5486-fcf0-2e83-6ae821893b73 and its actual cdm_ours_fhir.procedure_occurrence output row.
